selections.name: Rachini
selections.reason: Classy filly dropping back from G2 Reisling Stakes. Drawn perfectly in barrier 1 and handles wet conditions.

selections.name: Promenade
selections.reason: Solid second on debut and will strip fitter. Good draw and top jockey aboard.

selections.name: Japan
selections.reason: James McDonald takes the ride for Waller. Expecting sharp improvement from debut.

selections.name: Universe
selections.reason: Better for debut run and drawn to get a nice cart into the race.

danger_horse.name: Japan
danger_horse.reason: Elite jockey/trainer combo suggests this colt is much better than debut run indicates.

selections.name: Hellabella
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner with excellent soft track form (3:0-2-1). Drawn the inside and gets Tim Clark.

selections.name: Canal
selections.reason: Resuming with solid trial form. Placed on soft previously and Tommy Berry rides.

selections.name: Maluku
selections.reason: Pride-trained debutant who has trialed well. Watch betting.

selections.name: Isle Of Wight
selections.reason: Gelded since last prep. Can improve.

danger_horse.name: Maluku
danger_horse.reason: First starter from a top stable with strong trial form.

selections.name: Almaaz
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and gets James McDonald. Drawn well to stalk the pace.

selections.name: Think Itz You
selections.reason: Consistent form and drawn perfectly. Tommy Berry sticks.

selections.name: Lilac Girl
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner who will push forward. Fitter second up.

selections.name: Iron Legend
selections.reason: Ran on strongly last start. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Lilac Girl
danger_horse.reason: Pace influence from a leading stable; could prove hard to catch.

selections.name: Don't Doubt Merlin
selections.reason: Loves soft ground (7:4-0-0) and comes off a strong win. Drawn ideally.

selections.name: Wootton Lass
selections.reason: Won well last start and handles the wet. Main threat.

selections.name: Wondereach
selections.reason: Dropping in class and has excellent overall stats. Nash Rawiller rides.

selections.name: Shirvington
selections.reason: Has ability on his day and can run into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Wondereach
danger_horse.reason: Significant class drop makes him a major threat despite recent form.

selections.name: Subarctic
selections.reason: Consistent type with strong soft track form (11:3-3-1). Gets the inside draw.

selections.name: Lunar Lover
selections.reason: Racing well and handles the conditions. Good draw.

selections.name: Cormac T
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and has solid wet track credentials.

selections.name: Golden Century
selections.reason: James McDonald takes the ride. Expecting sharp improvement.

danger_horse.name: Golden Century
danger_horse.reason: JMac booking is a strong lead for a bounce back.

selections.name: Caesar
selections.reason: Promising gelding coming off a win. James McDonald rides from a perfect draw.

selections.name: Ready To Shine
selections.reason: In winning form and handles soft ground well. Major player.

selections.name: Zale
selections.reason: Consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race. Soft track suits.

selections.name: Zouripper
selections.reason: Drawn the inside and can improve second up.

danger_horse.name: Ready To Shine
danger_horse.reason: Strong recent form and proven in the conditions.

selections.name: Slinky
selections.reason: Consistent mare with a good draw and solid soft track stats.

selections.name: Emirate
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. James McDonald rides, expecting improvement.

selections.name: Diddle Dumpling
selections.reason: Racing well and handles the wet, but has an awkward draw.

selections.name: Hopper
selections.reason: Fitter second up and has won on soft ground previously.

danger_horse.name: Emirate
danger_horse.reason: Class edge and top jockey booking make him dangerous despite recent form.

selections.name: Maybe Moet
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start. Tommy Berry takes the ride and handles soft.

selections.name: Bubbles Up
selections.reason: Impressive debut winner. Awkward draw but has upside.

selections.name: Burj
selections.reason: Won well last start. Wide draw is a concern but has the ability.

selections.name: Totoka
selections.reason: Drawn well and has solid form lines for this.

danger_horse.name: Bubbles Up
danger_horse.reason: Unexposed Waterhouse/Bott filly who could be anything.
